zh.Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert ap Iorwerth於1267年出生在英國威爾斯可爾德時，他的父親Iorwerth ap Rhirid-7歲，母親Nest ferch Iorwerth-12歲。他與Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth結婚。他去世於1339年在威爾士安格萊利爾德享年72歲。

zh-hans.Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert ap Iorwerth于1267年出生在英国威尔斯可爾德时，他的父亲Iorwerth ap Rhirid-7岁，母亲Nest ferch Iorwerth-12岁。他与Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth结婚。他去世于1339年在威尔士安格萊利爾德享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert ap Iorwerth was born in 1267, in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Iorwerth ap Rhirid, was -7 and his mother, Nest ferch Iorwerth, was -12. He married Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth. He died in 1339, in Llechylched, Anglesey, Wales, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert ap Iorwerth est né en 1267, à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iorwerth ap Rhirid, avait -7 ans et sa mère, Nest ferch Iorwerth, avait -12 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth. Il est décédé en 1339, à Llechylched, Anglesey, Galles, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert ap Iorwerth 1267 in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iorwerth ap Rhirid -7 und seine Mutter Nest ferch Iorwerth -12. Er hat Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth geheiratet. Er starb 1339 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Llechylched, Anglesey, Wales.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert ap Iorwerth(이)가 1267년 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwerth ap Rhirid(은)는 -7세였고, 그의 어머니 Nest ferch Iorwerth(은)는 -12세였다. 그는 Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1339년 웨일스 앤글레시 렉히체드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert ap Iorwerth nasceu em 1267, em Clwyd, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Iorwerth ap Rhirid, tinha -7 anos e sua mãe, Nest ferch Iorwerth, tinha -12 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth. Ele faleceu em 1339, em Llechylched, Anglesey, Gales, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert ap Iorwerth родился в 1267 г. в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Iorwerth ap Rhirid было -7 год, а матери, которую звали Nest ferch Iorwerth, -12. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth. Он умер в 1339 г. в местности ллечилчед, англеси, Уэльс в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert ap Iorwerth nació en 1267, en Clwyd, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Iorwerth ap Rhirid, tenía -7 años y su mamá, Nest ferch Iorwerth, tenía -12 años. Se casó con Mrs. Robert Ap Lorwerth. Murió en 1339, en Llechylched, Isla Oscura, Gales, a la edad de 72 años.
